problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electrospun. Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
